description_long: This is a modern bolt-action rifle with a long, slender barrel and a fixed stock, designed for precision shooting. The rifle features a matte black finish throughout, giving it a tactical and utilitarian appearance. A prominent telescopic scope is mounted on top, indicating its use for long-range targeting. The stock is ergonomically shaped, with a slight curve for shoulder support and a straight comb for cheek alignment. The trigger guard and magazine well are integrated into the lower receiver, and the bolt handle is visible on the right side. The overall design is streamlined, with minimal external attachments aside from the scope.
description: A matte black bolt-action rifle with a fixed stock and a mounted telescopic scope, designed for precision and long-range shooting.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the long barrel, fixed stock, and mounted scope.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow profile of the barrel and the circular outline of the scope.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the stock, barrel, and scope, with the bolt handle less visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the butt of the stock and the alignment of the scope along the rifle's axis.
